highlights.text: Planning Compliance: Significant improvement of N3 on Legal maintenance compliance
CAS L9: Continued progress to complete installations and comply to MHSA

lowlights.text: Safety: Locker handle fingers laceration - FAC
CAS L9: Installation on LDs and UVs impacting productivity

emergingIssues.text: UG Plant Reliability: Continued delayed start ups due to instrumentation breakdowns (Comms failures)
Safety: Radios and telephones comms not stable post past weeks breakdown

priorities.text: SAT TIP 1 & 2 speed up: Focus on conveyor belt 55CV01 cable and motor replacements
Reliability: IGS session to improve reliability of HD and RTs
HR Resourcing: Completion of Foremen and GES appointments
DT 0172: Commissioning to improve on KPIs

utilityVehicles.Breakdown: The machine must be moved to Fermel Head Office for refurbishment of the bucket harness and front outriggers.
Machine reported with not starting. Main fuel pump wasn’t getting power, we changed the relay and bleeded the system.
Centre portion replaced. Busy with fitting shocks and steering rods.
